form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start 3rd in a small field at Toowoomba 2yo SW on March 27 over 1200m, 1.3 len behind Apostle carrying 57kg at $2.10. The race before that favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 1.1 len at Gold Coast Qtis Jewel 2yo March 14 over 1200m on a soft track defeating Esperanza with 57kg at $19. An inside draw is a big advantage. Progressive and is the one to beat.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start 3rd of 14 at Gold Coast Qtis Jewel 2yo on March 14 over 1200m, slow going 2.25 len behind Swift Dragon carrying 57kg at $8. The run before that scored a big 8 len win at Townsville 2yo Hcp March 5 over 1200m on a soft track defeating Felipity with 61kg at $1.05. Rates highly and expected to be right in it.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and shifted outwards hampering Mersey Lass and Felipity.
Jumped away awkwardly. Inclined to lay out under pressure in the home straight.
Laid in under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Second-up. Promising on debut was well back until straightening; raced back then made ground from the turn; won by 1.5 len at Mackay 2yo Hcp December 30 over 1100m defeating Felipity carrying 59kg at $4.20. Went for a spell before returning made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 8 at this track 2yo Hcp on March 24 over 1100m, slow going head behind Missile Baby carrying 59kg at $11. Fitter for the run and has good upside.
